_meta.description: Proposed WP -> static redirects for papik.cat migration (1 June 2026). Source: live WP sitemap_index.xml + 6 child sitemaps fetched 2026-04-27. Format mirrors vercel.json `redirects`. Strip _classification and _note before merging into vercel.json.

classification_legend.A: 1:1 direct match (slug exists on new site)
classification_legend.C: Pattern collapse (many WP URLs -> one new hub)
classification_legend.D: ES path normalization (Catalan slug under /es/ -> proper Spanish slug)
classification_legend.E: Already covered in vercel.json (NOT included in this file)

notes: WP serves both papik.cat and www.papik.cat. Vercel will canonicalise host; redirects below match path only.
Trailing slashes intentionally omitted — vercel.json has trailingSlash:false (canonical strips slash).

Patterns already covered in vercel.json (e.g. /category/:slug*, /tipusprojecte/:slug*, /author/:slug*, /productes-alta-eficiencia-energetica/:path*, /es/inicio, /diari, /pressupost-gratuit, etc.) are NOT duplicated here.
All redirects are permanent (301) for SEO equity transfer.

redirects._note: WP slug uses 'valldor' (Vall d'Or), new slug normalised to 'vallor'.
WP slug had ES 'en' even on CA URL — legacy bug.
Same project: 2nd certified Passivhaus Catalunya = PassivPalau.
Same project: 1a Passivhaus certificada Sant Cugat = K-del-Carril.
K-Colombia not in v1 catalogue — flagged for decision.
ES projects index not yet built; redirect to existing /es/projectes hub (rename pending to /es/proyectos).
